item.title: Sailors and sea workers, what's the most creepy or amazing sight you witnessed?
item.description:
1.....
2.....
3..... (sound)
4.....
5.....
6.....
7..... (sound) The Sperm Whale can click at 236 decibels- it is the loudest animal on the planet. They could easily “click” a person to death. But when they swim around humans they “lower their voices”, effectively whispering so as to not harm their tiny strange friends: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zsDwFGz0Okg
8.....
9..... “Salar de Uyuni Reflection” by Randy Halverson
10.....
11..... (sound)
12.....
13.....
14..... (sound) (it's music)
15.....
16..... (sound) Here's another encounter: The USS Nimitz UFO incident was a radar-visual encounter of a UFO by US fighter pilots of the Nimitz Carrier in 2004. Pentagon confirmed the footage & witness reports. Here's a fascinating half hour documentary about it: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PRgoisHRmUE
17..... p.s. No need to be afraid of aliens: https://imgur.com/Yxey8N6
18.....
19..... image or recreation of a UFO while submerged underwater
20.....
21..... (sound) (Video from a different dolphin migration)
22.....
23.....
24.....
25.....
26.....
27..... source: https://www.reddit.com/r/AskReddit/comments/129qhku/sailorspeople_working_at_sea_whats_the_most/
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: It's time for another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
is there a different option?
sertraline = zoloft
why
it really is something
practical
Homer demonstrated this in one of my favorite Simpsons episodes "The Cartridge Family"
mmm hmm
i don't think Anakin Skywalker will be joining
i knew they didn't actually exist
i was gonna guess bowling and cigarettes
delicious
well i'm convinced
my bug guy sent me this image and i was a bit flabbergasted
i feel this in my soul
i'm not going to tell you twice
stop doing this everyone
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: 5,500-Year-Old Sumerian Star Map.
item.description: For over 150 years scientists have tried to solve the mystery of a controversial cuneiform clay tablet that indicates the so-called Köfel’s impact event was observed in ancient times. The circular stone-cast tablet was recovered from the 650 BC underground library of King Ashurbanipal in Nineveh, Iraq in the late 19th century. Long thought to be an Assyrian tablet, computer analysis has matched it with the sky above Mesopotamia in 3300 BC and proves it to be of much more ancient Sumerian origin. The tablet is an “Astrolabe,” the earliest known astronomical instrument. It consists of a segmented, disk-shaped star chart with marked units of angle measure inscribed upon the rim.
item.dc:creator: Marco1959Collodi

item.title: Memes vol 286
item.description:
God can but I can’t
I’m trying to get my boyfriend to watch this with me
As if a chick is ever gonna see his dick especially as Adam. “Babe do you think it’d very rude to say his closet is made of glass?” “Who?” “He-Man” “He-man is in a poly relationship with 7 kids” “HUH?” “Oh that’s Captain Planet”
Yeah CRAIG you FUCK
@chriscaprisun
@chriscaprisun (again)
I KNOW YOU CAN I KNOW I CANT I DONT DAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAANCE
Florence covers this song and it’s so good
Coricoshat and Fentantyl tax (jk it’s Coricopat and Tantomile)
Liza Jane AS A NEWSIE tax
Scruffy and Froggy tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: OC comic reposts- help me pay for my dogs vet bills
item.description:
In case anyone’s confused about why I was such an odd kid…. ✨ AUTISM ✨
I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories. I posted the last two days about my dog needing help and so many of you rallied around us and generated funds and upvotes for exposure. He had to have two separate emergency surgeries totaling $12,000. We don’t even know if he will make it. The vets had us optimistic which is why we proceeded to save his life, but we got an update it’s about 50/50 now as he just got of his second surgery. we have about 10k of the 12k vet bills covered, we are almost to the full amount. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. —————- Original post details: We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. That night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the first life-saving surgery. Unfortunately though he needed another surgery (yesterday) and it didn’t go the way they planned. He has about 50/50 chance of making it. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards these two emergency surgeries would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc
item.dc:creator: ristay
